description: Departure point for third missionary journey. Paul strengthens disciples in region.
Paul visits twice to strengthen the growing churches. Travels route of first two journeys.
Paul stays nearly 3 years. Teaches daily, mighty miracles occur, demons flee from sick.
Paul travels through Macedonia visiting churches of Philippi, Thessalonica, Berea.
Paul spends three months in Greece. Likely in or near Corinth writing Romans.
Paul retraces route back through Macedonia gathering offerings for Jerusalem church.
Paul stays seven days. Raises Eutychus from dead after he falls from window.
Paul meets Ephesian elders. Emotional farewell speech: 'I know I won't see you again.'
Paul visits disciples here. They warn him not to go to Jerusalem.
Philip entertains Paul. Agabus prophesies Paul's arrest and imprisonment comes soon.
Paul delivers offering from Gentile churches. Arrested, beginning of Roman imprisonment.
